overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a character riding a horse through a rocky canyon river at dusk. The character wades through shallow water, follows the riverbank beneath a large wooden railway trestle bridge, and ascends into a narrow rocky passage as twilight settles.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river canyon with rocky banks

events.description: horse exits the river water onto the rocky gravel bank

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through the shallow river, splashing between large boulders while heading toward the distant wooden bridge

entered.detail: shallow flowing water with visible rocks beneath the surface and dynamic reflections
steep rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation casting deep shadows
steep rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock textures
large wooden railway bridge spanning the canyon width ahead
scattered boulders protruding from the riverbed

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit canyon with the character riding a horse through shallow river water. Large rocks dot the riverbed while steep canyon walls rise on both sides. A wooden railway trestle bridge is visible in the distance ahead, silhouetted against the dim twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank trail beneath canyon walls

events.description: sunlight becomes visible ahead as the canyon opens slightly, creating a silhouette effect

agents.ego_description: galloping along the gravel riverbank toward the large wooden trestle bridge, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: rocky shoreline alongside the river with mixed gravel and sand
evergreen trees on the canyon rim silhouetted against the twilight sky

segments.scene_description: The horse exits the water and rides along the gravel riverbank. The wooden bridge ahead grows larger as the character approaches. Pine trees line the canyon rim on the left, and the setting sun creates a dramatic backlight effect as the canyon walls open slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon trail passing beneath wooden railway bridge

events.description: passes beneath the wooden trestle bridge structure

agents.ego_description: riding under the large wooden railway bridge and continuing along the winding river path

segments.scene_description: The character rides beneath the massive wooden trestle bridge, passing close to its support structures. The river continues alongside the path but becomes narrower and more distant to the right as the trail winds through the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ascending canyon passage with steep rock walls

events.description: turns left away from the river and begins ascending the narrow rocky trail upward

agents.ego_description: climbing upward through a tight rocky canyon passage, navigating between close rock walls while leaving the river behind

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the river and enters a narrow, steep canyon passage. The rock walls close in on both sides as the horse climbs the winding dirt trail upward. The sky is visible as a narrow strip overhead, and the lighting becomes darker as the character moves deeper into the shadowed canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a wide, shallow riverbed through a massive railway structure and into a claustrophobic rocky gorge. It begins with the character riding a horse through a dimly lit canyon river, where steep walls rise above a rocky bed and a wooden trestle bridge looms in the distance. As the horse exits the water onto a gravel riverbank, the canyon opens slightly to reveal pine trees and a dramatic backlight from the setting sun. The camera then follows the rider directly beneath the towering wooden supports of the bridge before the trail winds away from the narrowing river. Finally, the scene shifts as the character turns into a steep, narrow passage where the rock walls close in and the lighting fades into deep shadow under a thin strip of twilight sky.
